description: Top-order batters allocated more overs in knockout matches
source: Top-3 avg balls faced in knockouts: 38 vs 28 in league games (Cricsheet IPL 2013-2026)

description: Batting first on a pace-friendly pitch in T20s is a disadvantage — batting team scores lower
source: Bat-first on pace pitches 1st-innings avg: 158 vs field-first avg 171 (Cricsheet 2019-2026)

description: Players with 0–1 rest days (back-to-back matches) tend to underperform slightly
source: Back-to-back T20 FP avg: 92% of normal average (analyst observation, IPL 2022-2026)

description: Home-ground advantage gives marginal uplift in T20 performance
source: Home vs away FP diff in franchise T20s: +6.2 pts (Cricsheet IPL/BBL/PSL 2015-2026)
